name: Main Street Capital CORP
business: Main Street Capital Corporation is a principal investment firm primarily focused on providing customized long-term debt and equity capital solutions to lower middle market (LMM) companies and debt capital to private (Private Loan) companies owned by or in the process of being acquired by a private equity fund. Main Street invests primarily in secured debt investments, equity investments, warrants and other securities of LMM companies typically based in the U.S.
